dataList.name: 3rd Anniversary Pack I
dataList.desc:
A limited 3rd Anniversary Pack. Contains the following items:

· Immediate access to Angela (Library Director - Early Days) Announcer
· 3★ Guarantee Decaextraction Ticket x1
· Identity Takeoff Ticket - ver.3 x1

※ Если you have already obtained the Angela (Library Director - Early Days) Announcer, acquire x50 Thread Crates вместо этого.
※ Identity Takeoff Ticket - ver.3 raises an Identity’s level up to 60, и Аптай up to Tier 4.

dataList.name: 3rd Anniversary Pack II
dataList.desc:
A limited 3rd Anniversary Pack. Contains the following item:

· 3rd Anniversary Nominable Identity Ticket x1

※ Use this item to select a Season 1~6 Identity released prior to Season 7 (including Standard Fare и Event Айдишки) to obtain.
※ Post-Season 7 commencement и Ночь депа Айдишки are not featured in this ticket.
